description: The complete open-source SEO data stack for AI agents: 7 sources, 86 tools, one MCP server
name: io.github.Raffaele86/seo-stack-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to a Google service-account JSON key (enables GSC + GA4)
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Path to a Google OAuth desktop client secrets JSON (alternative to service account)
environmentVariables.name: SEO_STACK_OAUTH_CLIENT

environmentVariables.description: AdSense account (accounts/pub-XXXX...) — enables AdSense tools on top of the Google credentials
environmentVariables.name: ADSENSE_ACCOUNT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Reporting currency for AdSense tools (default USD)
environmentVariables.name: ADSENSE_CURRENCY

environmentVariables.description: Bing Webmaster Tools API key (enables Bing tools)
environmentVariables.name: BING_WEBMASTER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Microsoft Clarity Data Export API token (enables Clarity tools)
environmentVariables.name: CLARITY_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Google Ads developer token (enables Keyword Planner tools; needs the google-ads extra)
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_DEVELOPER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Google Ads OAuth refresh token (adwords scope)
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Manager account id, if the customer is under an MCC
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_LOGIN_CUSTOMER_ID

environmentVariables.description: Open PageRank API key (enables the pagerank_score tool)
environmentVariables.name: OPENPAGERANK_API_KEY
